positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast celestial mandala print featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna. The composition must be highly detailed and centered, suitable for an apparel print. Include intricate, stylized cosmic vines, stylized lunar gateways, and glowing ethereal creatures (such as jellyfish-like forms and stylized moths). The art style blends Neo-Art Deco geometry with modern mystic linework. Use a limited, vibrant color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, neon purple, and glowing gold accents. Ensure strong, clean silhouettes and crisp linework against a dark midnight background. Intricate etching style, symmetry, highly detailed, vibrant contrast, suitable for textile printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, monochrome, cropped, writing, illegible, low detail, amateur, cartoon, ugly, photographic
